title: ETH vs. ETC: The Ethereum Fork Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the historical fork of Ethereum that created Ethereum (ETH) and Ethereum Classic (ETC), highlighting the key differences in their underlying philosophies and value.
elements: Ethereum (ETH) - New Chain with Modified History
relationships: DAO Hack exploits a vulnerability in a major smart contract
Community proposes a hard fork to reverse the hack and return funds
Fork is implemented, creating a new chain (ETH) with a altered transaction history
A portion of the community rejects the fork, maintaining the original chain (ETC) on principle of immutability
ETH becomes the dominant chain with majority developer/community support
ETC continues as a testament to 'code is law' and blockchain immutability
